sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM jdbc('jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/test_db?user=root&password=root', 'schema', 'table') ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT * FROM jdbc('jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/test_db?user=root&password=root', 'schema', 'table') WHERE id < 1000;
UPDATE test_table SET column_name = 'new_value' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM jdbc('jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/test_db?user=root&password=root', 'schema', 'table') WHERE status = 'inactive');
